name: Buhler Industries Inc.
summary: Buhler Industries Inc., through its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells agricultural equipment in Canada, the United States, Russia, Ukraine, Kazakhstan, and internationally. Its products include tractors, augers, snow blowers, mowers, tillage equipment, compact implements, and other products. The company markets its products primarily under the Farm King, Ezee-On, Allied, Inland, and Versatile brand names through a dealer/distribution network. It also maintains parts warehouses. The company was founded in 1932 and is headquartered in Winnipeg, Canada. Buhler Industries Inc. is a subsidiary of Combine Factory Rostselmash Ltd.
